dna_card.headline: A strategic developer who builds elegant systems across multiple languages. Your code is your canvas.

top_languages_analysis.primary: Python - Your go-to language for elegant problem solving
top_languages_analysis.insight: Your language choices reveal a developer who values versatility and pragmatism. You're equally comfortable in frontend and backend worlds.

commit_style_analysis.description: Your commits tell a story. Well-structured messages that show intention and context. A developer who respects future maintainers.

readme_quality.description: You believe in documentation. 70% of your repos have thoughtful READMEs. Your projects invite collaboration.

strengths: 🎯 Architecture & System Design - You think in systems, not just code. Your projects have a clear direction and scalable foundation.
🌍 Language Versatility - Mastery across Python, JavaScript, Go, and Rust shows you're adaptable and always learning new paradigms.
brutal_truths: ⚠️ Perfectionism Paradox - Sometimes your pursuit of the 'right' architecture delays shipping. Not every project needs a microservices setup.
📚 Documentation vs Code Ratio - While your READMEs are great, some complex functions could use inline comments. Future you will thank present you.
quirks: You have a fondness for naming things well - your variable names read like poetry
You commit frequently but in thoughtful batches, not random saves
Your most starred project is your 'learning experiment' from 3 years ago
dna_card.fun_fact: Based on your commit patterns, you're most productive between 10 PM and 2 AM. You're a night owl developer who ships quality code when the world sleeps. 🦉

profile.name: Linus Torvalds
profile.bio: Linux creator, maintainer, and occasional troublemaker
